verses.3: For this is what the LORD says to the men of Judah and Jerusalem:
verses.5: Announce in Judah, proclaim in Jerusalem, and say:
verses.10: Then I said, “Ah, Lord GOD, how completely You have deceived this people and Jerusalem by saying, ‘You will have peace,’ while a sword is at our throats.”
verses.11: At that time it will be said to this people and to Jerusalem, “A searing wind from the barren heights in the desert blows toward the daughter of My people, but not to winnow or to sift;
verses.12: a wind too strong for that comes from Me. Now I also pronounce judgments against them.”
verses.27: For this is what the LORD says:
